title.en: After all, eighteen pieces of innocent gold are...

content.en:
However, even if Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor traded eighteen pieces of Heavenly True Gold from Ye Tian, he did not bid for the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order in the end.

After all, eighteen pieces of innocent gold are really insignificant.

The True Dragon Realm Ruins Order was auctioned off by another Heavenly Ancestor for 110,000 Innocent Gold Coins.

Of course, this has nothing to do with Ye Tian.

He had already obtained what he wanted, and he could go and cultivate the immeasurable magic of the Heaven Slaying Blade.

"The auction is over!"

After Ye Tian exchanged the bidding items, he left the auction venue.

However, he did not leave Falcon Dragon City, but prepared to cultivate in Falcon Dragon City for a period of time.

......

"Pay attention to my great ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He auctioned the Extreme Art Inheritance and some materials at the auction this time, and such a terrifying value would definitely be noticed.

For the sake of safety, he had to train the Sky Slayer Blade in Falcon Dragon City and step into the fifth stage realm of the Boundary Breaking Level.

Somewhere in Hayabusa Dragon City.

Ye Tian practiced in retreat here, and he had already thoroughly comprehended the immeasurable magic technique of the Heaven Slaying Blade, and now he could practice directly.

If he saves a little of the materials in his current hand, he can make three portions, ensuring that he cultivates three times.

Immediately, he went through his first cultivation.

One by one, he refined them into the immeasurable bones, and cultivated them in the same way as the Heaven Slaying Blade.

It goes well at first, and then in the middle of a process, it fails because of improper control, which leads to a total failure.

Click!!

Ye Tian's immeasurable bones were broken, causing damage to the foundation.

No matter what kind of immeasurable magic power is cultivated, if the cultivation fails, it will cause certain injuries to the flesh and blood, and it will take a long time to repair it.

He didn't have that much time to slowly repair the replica body.

So, he directly re-copied a replica body and replaced this replica body.

Subsequently, he began his second cultivation.

This time, he was not so unlucky, and his direct cultivation was successful.

With the successful cultivation of the Heaven Slaying Blade, his flesh and blood began to transform under the effect of the Infinite Divine Skill.

Moreover, this transformation is not an ordinary transformation, it directly helped him break the shackles of the fifth stage, from the invincible fifth stage of the combat power breakthrough to the fifth stage of the boundary breaking level.

Such a metamorphosis is too great!

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's body, and even the magic circle in this temporary residence could not hide it.

In an instant, the gaze of a Venerable Great Ancestor or Heavenly Ancestor looked at Ye Tian's location.

"Is this a great ancestor who has broken through to the fifth stage of the boundary breaking level?"

"It's indeed a boundary-breaking breath, who is it?"

"It's been a long time since a new Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor has been born, and now another one has been born!"

The fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level is even rarer than the Heavenly Ancestor, the number is extremely rare, and this kind of Great Ancestor has unlimited potential, once he becomes a Heavenly Ancestor in the future, he will directly surpass the ordinary Heavenly Ancestor.

Even in terms of status, the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level was no less than a Heavenly Ancestor.

At this time, many invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestors and even some Heavenly Ancestors were ready to wait for Ye Tian's breakthrough to be completely completed, and then they would visit Ye Tian.

Time flies, and it is a long time to pass.

this day.

Ye Tian finally completely stabilized in the realm of the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Rank Great Ancestor.

"Finally broke through, this is the boundary-breaking body!"

Ye Tian felt that his body at this moment was far beyond before, and his every move could burst the body of the fifth stage of the general invincible level, and he could completely exert the power of any immeasurable divine power.

Of course, his most powerful methods at present are the two immeasurable magic techniques of the Heaven Slaying Blade and the Ten Arms Golden Body, and these two immeasurable magic skills can also be combined to burst out with even more powerful power.

Although he had stepped into the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level, Ye Tian would not be so arrogant that he really competed with those Heavenly Ancestors, he could only compete with ordinary Heavenly Ancestors at most, but a little bit of Heavenly Ancestor who had been cultivating for a long time could crush him.

Even compared to an old Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor like the True Night Great Ancestor, he was afraid that he would not be able to beat it.

Unless he practiced the Extreme Technique again, he would be able to surpass the True Night Ancestor and them.

Wow!

The circle opens.

As soon as Ye Tian was about to go out, he found that a great ancestor appeared in front of him and came to congratulate him.

Not only that, but some Heavenly Ancestors also came to congratulate.

"Endless Great Ancestor, it was you who broke through!"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor was also among them, he was a little shocked at the moment, he never expected that it was Ye Tian who broke through to become a boundary-breaking great ancestor.

I think that at the beginning, when Ye Tian took over his task, he was still a fourth-stage great ancestor, and his strength was still very weak.

But now how many years have passed, and Ye Tian has become a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

With such a growth rate, even the most powerful Heavenly Ancestor can't cultivate it!

"The Endless Great Ancestor has a great opportunity, even beyond my imagination!"

Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor secretly guessed.

However, Ye Tian has grown up, he may be able to crush Ye Tian, but it is a little difficult to kill Ye Tian.

Moreover, if he really offended a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor like Ye Tian, as long as Ye Tian hid and stepped into the Heavenly Ancestor in the future, he would be dead.

Therefore, he didn't dare to fight Ye Tian's idea.

Not only Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, but also Heavenly Ancestor who investigated Ye Tian's origin a little, would guess that Ye Tian had an unimaginable opportunity, but they didn't dare to seize it.

For the congratulations of many Great Ancestors and Heavenly Ancestors, Ye Tian also responded one by one.

Soon after, these Great Ancestors and Heavenly Ancestors all left.

......

After breaking through to become a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, Ye Tian's next purpose was to gather the materials for cultivating the Extreme Technique.

He still has a dozen precious materials to see if he can get some together in Falcon Dragon City.

I have to say that after becoming a Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, the advantage is that I can talk to the Heavenly Ancestor.

If before, he was only an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor, the Heavenly Ancestors didn't bother to pay attention, even if you wanted to trade with the Heavenly Ancestor, you wouldn't be able to find a channel.

But now it's different, he can find some Heavenly Ancestors to trade, and he only needs to come up with resources that make the Heavenly Ancestors interested.

No, Ye Tian chatted with Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor.

"Endless Great Ancestor, you really dare to cultivate the Extreme Technique!" "Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor learned that Ye Tian wanted to trade those materials, so he guessed that Ye Tian was going to cultivate the Extreme Technique, so he was a little surprised.

After all, Ye Tiandu is already a fifth-stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level, and his potential is unlimited, so there is no need to take risks!

"Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, you just say you have it, right?"

Ye Tian said lightly.
